hero.title: Unite site, production, finance, and approval in one proposal workspace.

proof.engineeringText: PVGIS/JS with a Python backend pilot and pvlib-ready contract.
proof.governanceText: Evidence, approval, source freshness, and audit controls stay active.
proof.clientText: Savings, ROI, confidence, and next actions are framed for decisions.
